notes: Added a reusable typography layer in globals.css for kicker, meta-label, chip-label, display, title, and chord roles.
Replaced ad hoc arbitrary tracking values across the songs workspace with shared semantic classes.
Aligned the global app navigation eyebrow with the same shared typography system instead of a one-off tracking value.
open_issues: Typography semantics are still defined as CSS classes rather than a full token contract in the design token schema.
Other non-songs surfaces still rely on local text styling and may need a follow-up pass if the typography system expands repo-wide.
Section and metadata styles still mix semantic classes with local size overrides where the layout needs different scale.
